title: eremophila regia
intro: Eremophila regia, also known as the royal emu bush, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It is a shrub that has been used in traditional Australian medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and aiding in wound healing, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Eremophila regia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
